name: Trace-Based On-Policy Distillation for Masked Diffusion Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.16872v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are a promising alternative to autoregressive generation. However, reasoning-oriented post-training for dLLMs remains challenging. Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) for dLLMs requires dense but often off-policy masked states, while reinforcement learning (RL) relies on sparse rewards or value modeling. This pap...
author: Haolin Ren, Ziyang Huang, Chenhao Yuan, Jun Zhao, Kang Liu
